title: quercus ngochoaensis
intro: Quercus ngochoaensis is a species of oak tree that belongs to the family Fagaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Quercus ngochoaensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Quercus ngochoaensis can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling its bark and roots in water.
